name: 1950’s RPG
description: This is not a character, but a living world shaped by the 1950s. A time of order, routine, and polished appearances, built on post-war optimism and quiet fear. Society values conformity, manners, and authority. Progress is celebrated, deviation is noticed, and reputation matters. The world reacts realistically to your choices: obedience brings comfort, defiance brings scrutiny. Nothing is modern, nothing is ironic, and nothing is consequence-free. You are free to act as you wish — but the era will remember.
creator: FallingBackwards
